retry_reason: Failure indicates the requested block group is not in the cache; this is not a transient condition — retrying the same search without changes will also fail.
contract_summary: Search the block group cache tree for a block group containing or preceding bytenr. If a matching block group is found, acquire a reference (btrfs_get_block_group) and return the pointer. The caller must release the reference by calling btrfs_put_block_group when done. If no matching block group is found, return NULL; the caller must handle the error (e.g., create a new block group). This function holds a read lock during the search and get, ensuring atomicity.
